hooks.command: BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.pre.write.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/check_bugate.py"

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.pre.write.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/check_plan_lock.py"

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.pre.write.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/check_role_evidence.py"

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.pre.role.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/check_agent_role_paths.py"

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.prompt.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/bugate_prompt_reminder.py"

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.session-start.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/memory_bus.py" session-start --core --agent agent

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.session-start.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; "$ROOT/bin/bugate-role" session-start

BUGATE_HOOK_ID='bugate.claude.stop.v1'; export BUGATE_HOOK_ID; ROOT="$(/usr/bin/env python3 -c 'import os; from pathlib import Path; p=Path.cwd(); print(os.environ.get("BUGATE_ENGINE_ROOT") or next((str(c) for c in [p,*p.parents] if (c/"scripts"/"bugate_core.py").exists()), ""))')"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || exit 0; /usr/bin/env python3 "$ROOT/scripts/memory_bus.py" stop --core --agent "${BUGATE_AGENT_ROLE:-agent}"
